sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
content: Cookies are small text files stored on a user's device when visiting a website.
They ensure the proper functioning of the website and allow traffic analysis.

sections.title: 2. What types of cookies do we use?
content: Technical cookies – necessary for the proper operation of the website.
Analytical cookies – used to analyze how the website is used.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of using cookies
content: To ensure the proper functioning of the website.
To improve performance and analyze visitor statistics.

sections.title: 4. Managing cookies
content: Users can change their cookie settings at any time in their browser.
Restricting the use of cookies may affect certain website functionalities.

sections.title: 5. Changes to the Cookie Policy
content: The administrator reserves the right to make changes to this policy.
The current version of the document is always available on the website.
